message:
feat(stats): integrate rich output into stats command

- Add rich panel display with progress bars for status breakdown
- Status coloring based on theme (open=green, in_progress=yellow, etc.)
- Visual progress bars for breakdown distributions (type, priority, assignee, label)
- Health warnings section for blocked/deferred issues
- Activity summary section
- Preserves JSON and plain text output modes unchanged

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
